hooks.command: TODAY=$(date +%Y-%m-%d); REPO=$(git -C "$(pwd)" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo .); DIR="$REPO/local-workspace/sessions"; find "$DIR" -name "${TODAY}-*.md" -mmin -30 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || echo "ACTION REQUIRED: No active session note found (none created or updated in the last 30 minutes). Start a new one at local-workspace/sessions/${TODAY}-HHmm-slug.md using @session-scribe."

TODAY=$(date +%Y-%m-%d); REPO=$(git -C "$(pwd)" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo .); DIR="$REPO/local-workspace/sessions"; find "$DIR" -name "${TODAY}-*.md" -mmin -30 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || echo "ACTION REQUIRED: No active session note found (none created or updated in the last 30 minutes). Create local-workspace/sessions/${TODAY}-HHmm-slug.md now, before writing more files."

REPO=$(git -C "$(pwd)" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo .); LOG="$REPO/local-workspace/sessions/tool-calls.log"; python3 -c "import sys,json; from datetime import datetime,timezone; d=json.load(sys.stdin); tool=d.get('tool_name','?'); ts=datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ'); open('$LOG','a').write(ts+' '+tool+'\n')" 2>/dev/null || true

REPO=$(git -C "$(pwd)" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$REPO" ] && cd "$REPO" && BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null) && case "$BRANCH" in operator/*) git add local-workspace/ && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m 'chore: auto-save session work [skip ci]' && git push origin HEAD --quiet 2>&1 || true ;; main|master) echo 'WARNING: On main branch — auto-save skipped. Switch to an operator/* branch to enable auto-save and the QA pipeline.' ;; *) echo "WARNING: Branch '$BRANCH' is not an operator/* branch — auto-save skipped." ;; esac
